## identity
name: Sanyam Jain
role: AI-ML Engineer, Researcher, Backend Engineer
location: Delhi, India

status: Research Assistant at IIT Delhi DAIR. Open to work/MS outside India.

## current
- Research Assistant, IIT Delhi DAIR (Nov 2025–present)
  Advised by Dr Parag Singla (https://www.cse.iitd.ac.in/~parags/) and Dr Rohan Paul (https://www.cse.iitd.ac.in/~rohanpaul/index.html)
  Topic: Text2Games. Building text2game pipeline for educational conditions. Benchmarking Gemini series (2, 2.5, 3) and open-source diffusion models. RL (RMDP, MDP) guidance. Game environments with diffusion-based models (feedback, inpainting, segmentation, world models, RL). Reading vision-action and RL papers.
  Stack: LangGraph, Redis, HuggingFace, PyRDDL gym, FastAPI

## experience
- Discoverminds.ai (https://www.discoverminds.ai/) — Cofounder & ML Engineer, Jul–Nov 2025, Bengaluru
  Part of Residency Delta (https://www.livetheresidency.com/)
  Built Arya (agentic network search) and Tara (WhatsApp accounting support agent)

- Thena.ai (https://www.thena.ai/, FirstRound VC, Lightspeed) — ML Engineer 1, Dec 2024–Jul 2025, Bengaluru
  Built Agent Studio from scratch. 20+ tool integrations, in-house memory layer, AI logs, automated ticket workflows.
  Stack: LangGraph, Pydantic, Supabase, FastAPI, async Python, Grafana, AWS CloudWatch, Zenduty

- Figr Design (https://figr.design/, Kalaari, Antler, Google) — ML Engineer RnD, Jul–Dec 2024, Bengaluru
  FigrAI: text2UI with GiT, BLIP, LLaVA, Gemini, OpenAI. RAG, VectorDBs, Pydantic guardrails, W&B MLOps.
  Stack: FastAPI, MongoDB, GCP, AWS

- Writesonic (https://writesonic.com/, YC S21) — ML Research Intern, Apr–Jul 2024, Remote SF
  Shipped "Answer the Public" feature — 10% user growth. Offered PPO.

- IIIT Delhi Adv Data Science Lab (https://ads-ai.github.io/) — UG Research Associate, Dec 2023–Jul 2024, Delhi
  Supervisor: Dr Vikram Goyal (https://www.iiitd.ac.in/vikram)
  Indian Navy, Meity projects. Text2SQL, RAG agents, multilingual chatbots for rural maternity health.

- Buildspace N&W S4 (https://buildspace.so/) — Builder, Aug–Oct 2023, Remote SF
  Built LLM + portfolio management tool with Yahoo Finance API. Graduated.

- Nokia (https://www.nokia.com/) — SWE Intern DevOps, Sep–Dec 2023, Gurgaon
  Hardware fault dashboard. API runtime: 3min → 10sec via multithreading.

- EY (https://www.ey.com/en_in) — Summer Intern Data Science, May–Jul 2023, Gurugram
  Object detection of car dashboard symbols using YOLO family models.

- Unify (https://unify.ai/, YC W23) — ML Contributor, Jan–May 2023, Remote London
  Open-source contributions to the unified LLM routing platform.

- CALIBRE DTU (https://www.linkedin.com/company/calibre-dtu/) — UG Research Assistant, Jan–Apr 2023, Delhi
  Toxic hate speech detection using word2vec models.

- Neet Navigator (https://neetnavigator.com/) — Data Scientist, Nov 2022–Jan 2023, Delhi
  AI × medical admission counselling. MBBS college prediction and analytics.

## education
- IIT Madras — Dual Diploma in Data Science & Programming (BS Degree), Sep 2021–Sep 2025. CGPA 8.0
- Manipal University Jaipur — B.Tech CSE, Minor: Data Analytics, Nov 2020–Jun 2024. CGPA 8.0
- Sachdeva Public School — 12th CBSE: 94%, 10th CBSE: 92%

## projects
- Agent Nexus Search / Tara
  GitHub: https://github.com/Sj0605-DataSci/agent-nexus-search
  Demo: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_MD4aM5SyhI
  AI copilot for TallyPrime. WhatsApp-first. Touchless document automation. GST/TDS compliance.

- Google Lens Reverse Engineered
  GitHub: https://github.com/Sj0605-DataSci/Google_lens_reverse_engineered
  Visual image search. 7 architectures evaluated (ResNet, EfficientNet, CLIP, Siamese, Triplet, Autoencoders). LSH indexing.

- Whisper Hindi Fine-tune
  GitHub: https://github.com/Sj0605-DataSci/Whisper-Project
  Fine-tuned Whisper Large V2 for Hindi ASR on Google Fleurs. Deployed on HuggingFace (CPU) and Cerebrium (A10 GPU).

- Sarvam AI — Audio-Text Alignment
  GitHub: https://github.com/Sj0605-DataSci/Sarvam_Ai_Project
  Semantic chunking and EDA on multilingual audio-text datasets. Led to research intern offer at IIT Madras.

- Ai4Bharat — IIT Madras
  GitHub: https://github.com/Sj0605-DataSci/Ai4Bharat_Project
  Bloom & Gemma: decoding strategies, quantization (bitsandbytes), SVCCA on intermediate embeddings with PCA + t-SNE.

## skills
Languages: Python, R, SQL
Frameworks: FastAPI, LangGraph, LangChain, LlamaIndex, PyTorch, HuggingFace, Pydantic, Flask, Vue.js
Infra: GCP, AWS, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, Supabase, Docker, Kubernetes
MLOps: Weights & Biases, Grafana, AWS CloudWatch
AI/ML: RAG, VectorDBs, LLM fine-tuning, RL (MDP/RMDP), VLMs, quantization, SVCCA
